question.label: Stopped pushing
question.name: You said "stopped pushing" — what made you back off?
question.description: Drills into the stalled mentoring thread to surface whether the blocker is time, confidence, or lack of support.

answer: I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.

assessment.note: Uncertainty about next-quarter ownership is making her uneasy; that is a mild wellbeing strain, and the stronger clarity signal is off-signature but worth picking up next.

history.answer_excerpt: I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
